raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "declarative commitment expressing surrender of personal agency to a higher power",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a God or higher power exists and is capable of care",
    "surrendering one's will and life produces positive outcomes",
    "understanding of God is necessarily subjective and valid in that form",
    "human autonomy is appropriately relinquished in favor of divine guidance"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a faith-based or recovery principle but rests on untestable theological premises",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the recipient shares theistic beliefs and finds surrender psychologically or spiritually beneficial",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no deity exists, surrender produces harm or dependency, or the statement is applied as universal ethical guidance rather than personal testimony"
}
